2.Question: Compare the monthly claims trends for Trodelvy and Enhertu over the past 12 months.
2.Correct Code: WITH latest_date AS ( SELECT MAX(svc_dt) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_mx_onc_hist_preprocessed` ), date_range AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date), -13)) AS start_date, LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date), -2)) AS end_date FROM latest_date ) SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', mx.svc_dt) AS claim_month, COALESCE(hcpcs_map.regimen, ndc_map.regimen) AS regimen, COUNT(DISTINCT mx.mx_clam_id) AS total_claims FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_mx_onc_hist_preprocessed` mx LEFT JOIN `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`breast_cancer_drugs_hcpcs_codes_mapped` hcpcs_map ON mx.prcr_cd = hcpcs_map.procedure_code LEFT JOIN `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`breast_cancer_drugs_ndc_codes_mapped` ndc_map ON mx.ndc11 = ndc_map.product_code CROSS JOIN date_range WHERE mx.pt_cycle_id = ( SELECT MAX(pt_cycle_id) FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_mx_onc_hist_preprocessed` ) AND mx.svc_dt BETWEEN date_range.start_date AND date_range.end_date AND (hcpcs_map.regimen IN ('TRODELVY', 'ENHERTU') OR ndc_map.regimen IN ('TRODELVY', 'ENHERTU')) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

regimen claims regimen_zscore AS ( SELECT rm.claim_month, rm.regimen, rm.rx_claims, rs.mean_regimen_claims, rs.stddev_regimen_claims, CASE WHEN rs.stddev_regimen_claims > 0 THEN ROUND((rm.rx_claims - rs.mean_regimen_claims) / rs.stddev_regimen_claims, 2) ELSE 0 END AS zscore_regimen FROM regimen_monthly rm LEFT JOIN regimen_stats rs ON rm.regimen = rs.regimen WHERE rs.regimen IS NOT NULL ), -- Combine total and regimen-level analysis combined_analysis AS ( SELECT mtz.claim_month, mtz.total_oral_chemo_tnbc_claims, mtz.mean_total_claims, mtz.deviation_from_mean, mtz.zscore_total, -- Aggregate regimen-level outliers for each month COUNT(CASE WHEN ABS(rz.zscore_regimen) >= 2.0 THEN 1 END) AS significant_regimen_outliers, COUNT(CASE WHEN ABS(rz.zscore_regimen) >= 1.5 THEN 1 END) AS moderate_regimen_outliers, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ABS(rz.zscore_regimen) >= 2.0 THEN CONCAT(rz.regimen, ' (Z:', CAST(rz.zscore_regimen AS STRING), ')') END, ', ' ) AS significant_outlier_regimens, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ABS(rz.zscore_regimen) >= 1.5 AND ABS(rz.zscore_regimen) < 2.0 THEN CONCAT(rz.regimen, ' (Z:', CAST(rz.zscore_regimen AS STRING), ')') END, ', ' ) AS moderate_outlier_regimens FROM monthly_total_zscore mtz LEFT JOIN regimen_zscore rz ON mtz.claim_month = rz.claim_month GROUP BY mtz.claim_month, mtz.total_oral_chemo_tnbc_claims, mtz.mean_total_claims, mtz.deviation_from_mean, mtz.zscore_total ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(claim_month, 'yyyy-MM') AS month_year, claim_month, total_oral_chemo_tnbc_claims, ROUND(mean_total_claims, 0) AS avg_monthly_claims, deviation_from_mean, zscore_total, significant_regimen_outliers, moderate_regimen_outliers, significant_outlier_regimens, moderate_outlier_regimens, CASE WHEN ABS(zscore_total) >= 2.0 THEN 'SIGNIFICANT_TOTAL_OUTLIER' WHEN ABS(zscore_total) >= 1.5 THEN 'MODERATE_TOTAL_OUTLIER' WHEN significant_regimen_outliers > 0 THEN 'REGIMEN_LEVEL_OUTLIER' WHEN moderate_regimen_outliers > 0 THEN 'MODERATE_REGIMEN_OUTLIER' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS outlier_status, CASE WHEN zscore_total >= 2.0 THEN 'HIGH_VOLUME_MONTH' WHEN zscore_total <= -2.0 THEN 'LOW_VOLUME_MONTH' WHEN zscore_total >= 1.5 THEN 'MODERATE_HIGH_VOLUME' WHEN zscore_total <= -1.5 THEN 'MODERATE_LOW_VOLUME' WHEN significant_regimen_outliers > 0 THEN 'REGIMEN_ANOMALY' ELSE 'NORMAL_RANGE' END AS outlier_direction, CASE WHEN ABS(zscore_total) >= 2.0 AND significant_regimen_outliers > 0 THEN 'BOTH_TOTAL_AND_REGIMEN' WHEN ABS(zscore_total) >= 2.0 THEN 'TOTAL_CLAIMS_ONLY' WHEN significant_regimen_outliers > 0 THEN 'REGIMEN_SPECIFIC_ONLY' ELSE 'NO_MAJOR_OUTLIERS' END AS outlier_type FROM combined_analysis WHERE ABS(zscore_total) >= 1.5 OR significant_regimen_outliers > 0 OR moderate_regimen_outliers > 1  -- Show months with multiple moderate outliers ORDER BY ABS(zscore_total) DESC, claim_month DESC

MX mx_batch2 AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', mx.svc_dt) as claim_month, COUNT(mx.mx_clam_id) as mx_claims FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_mx_onc_hist_preprocessed` mx LEFT JOIN `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`breast_cancer_drugs_hcpcs_codes_mapped` hcpcs ON mx.prcr_cd = hcpcs.procedure_code AND hcpcs.regimen IN ('DATROWAY', 'ENHERTU', 'TRODELVY') LEFT JOIN `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`breast_cancer_drugs_ndc_codes_mapped` ndc ON mx.ndc11 = ndc.product_code WHERE mx.pt_cycle_id = (SELECT pt_cycle_id FROM mx_batches WHERE batch_rank = 2) AND ndc.regimen IN ('DATROWAY', 'ENHERTU', 'TRODELVY') AND (hcpcs.procedure_code IS NOT NULL OR ndc.product_code IS NOT NULL) AND mx.svc_dt <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', (SELECT MAX(svc_dt) FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_mx_onc_hist_preprocessed` WHERE pt_cycle_id = (SELECT pt_cycle_id FROM mx_batches WHERE batch_rank = 2))), -2)) GROUP BY claim_month ), -- BATCH 2 COMBINED batch2_combined AS ( SELECT COALESCE(rx.claim_month, mx.claim_month) as claim_month, COALESCE(rx.rx_claims, 0) + COALESCE(mx.mx_claims, 0) as total_claims FROM rx_batch2 rx FULL OUTER JOIN mx_batch2 mx ON rx.claim_month = mx.claim_month ), -- BATCH COMPARISON WITH PERCENTAGE CHANGE batch_comparison AS ( SELECT COALESCE(b1.claim_month, b2.claim_month) as claim_month, b1.total_claims as batch1_claims, b2.total_claims as batch2_claims, b1.total_claims - b2.total_claims as absolute_change, CASE WHEN b2.total_claims > 0 THEN ((b1.total_claims - b2.total_claims)::FLOAT / b2.total_claims) * 100 ELSE NULL END as pct_change FROM batch1_combined b1 FULL OUTER JOIN batch2_combined b2 ON b1.claim_month = b2.claim_month WHERE b1.total_claims IS NOT NULL AND b2.total_claims IS NOT NULL ), -- IQR CALCULATION ON PERCENTAGE CHANGES pct_change_quartiles AS ( SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pct_change) as q1, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pct_change) as median, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pct_change) as q3 FROM batch_comparison WHERE pct_change IS NOT NULL ), pct_change_bounds AS ( SELECT q1, q3, median, (q3 - q1) as iqr, q1 - 1.5 * (q3 - q1) as lower_bound, q3 + 1.5 * (q3 - q1) as upper_bound FROM pct_change_quartiles ) -- FINAL OUTLIER DETECTION WITH IQR SELECT bc.claim_month, bc.batch1_claims, bc.batch2_claims, bc.absolute_change, bc.pct_change, b.median as median_pct_change, b.q1, b.q3, b.iqr, b.lower_bound, b.upper_bound, CASE WHEN bc.pct_change > b.upper_bound THEN 'High Outlier' WHEN bc.pct_change < b.lower_bound THEN 'Low Outlier' ELSE 'Normal' END as outlier_flag, ((bc.pct_change - q1) as iqr, q1 - 1.5 * (q3 - q1) as lower_bound, q3 + 1.5 * (q3 - q1) as upper_bound FROM quartiles ) SELECT c.claim_month, c.total_claims, b.median, b.q1, b.q3, b.iqr, b.lower_bound, b.upper_bound, CASE WHEN c.total_claims > b.upper_bound THEN 'High Outlier' WHEN c.total_claims < b.lower_bound THEN 'Low Outlier' ELSE 'Normal' END as outlier_flag, ((c.total_claims - 39.Question: GIVE ME THE MONTHLY TREND OF THE hormonal THERAPY DRUGS ?
39.Correct Code: WITH hormonal_claims AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', rx.fill_dt) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT rx.clam_id) AS claim_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_rx_onc_hist_preprocessed` rx LEFT JOIN `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`breast_cancer_drugs_ndc_codes_mapped` ndc ON rx.ndc11 = ndc.product_code WHERE rx.clam_type = 'PD' AND rx.pt_cycle_id = ( SELECT MAX(pt_cycle_id) FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`stg_iqvia_laad_rx_onc_hist_preprocessed` ) AND ndc.regimen IN ('OTHER HORMONAL', 'ORSERDU', 'FULVESTRANT') GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', rx.fill_dt) ) SELECT month, claim_count, LAG(claim_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_claim_count, ROUND((claim_count - LAG(claim_count) OVER (ORDER BY month)) / LAG(claim_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) * 100, 2) AS month_over_month_growth FROM hormonal_claims ORDER BY month
